scripts.test:coverage: npm run render:runtime-auth-config:override && rm -rf .nyc_output coverage && playwright test && npx nyc report --reporter=text --reporter=lcov && npx nyc check-coverage --branches 100 --functions 100 --lines 100 --statements 100
scripts.test:integration: npm run render:runtime-auth-config:override && playwright test --config playwright.integration.config.js
